rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description '183A.' as visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini misread 'A' as '4'.

Selected gemini-flash's amount values (pence 0, fraction 0.75) as visual inspection confirms '0 3/4' for pence and fraction. Merged description from gemini-flash, which is more accurate. gpt-5-mini misread '0 3/4' as '3 1/2'.

rows.description: One fourth of improved Rents from Pickford & Norris in Lad Lane. to Mich. 1833
rows.notes: Used gpt-5-mini's description for overall completeness, correcting 'lane' capitalization from visual. Pounds and shillings match. For pence, visually 'A' is present. Selected gemini-flash's interpretation of 'A' as 0.5d (half-penny), as this is a common historical ledger practice for fractions. gpt-5-mini misread 'A' as '4'.
rows.english_description: One-fourth share of improved rents from Pickford & Norris in Lad Lane, due to Michaelmas 1833.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One-fourth share of improved rents from Pickford & Norris in Lad Lane, due to Michaelmas 1833, amounting to £15 3s 0.5d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: One-fourth share of rents from the Maidenhead estate, due to Christmas 1832, amounting to £15 13s 10d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description, with minor correction of 'P/Cout.' to 'P/Cont.' based on visual inspection; it is significantly more accurate than gpt-5-mini's. Amounts are agreed and clear.

rows.description: Of the Caution Fund. the 3d Loan, on acct of the New Front of the College
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's segmentation and description structure, correcting 'the 3 Loan' to 'the 3d Loan' and capitalizing 'Of' from visual inspection. The amount 905.19.10 applies to this entire entry, as correctly captured by gpt-5-mini and by gemini-flash (though gemini-flash incorrectly split the description).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Loan from the Caution Fund (third loan) on account of the new front of the college, amounting to £905 19s 10d.

rows.description: Reimbursement of Law Expenses from D. Richard.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement of legal expenses from D. Richard; amount not stated.

rows.description: va Sel Var. 1833. Fund. on acct of the purchase of Woodleigh
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description for completeness, including the marginal 'va Sel Var. 1833.' text, and its interpretation of 'A' as 0.5d for the fraction, consistent with Row 3 and historical ledger practices. Removed '- 3' from gemini-flash description, visually appears as a dash for continuation. gpt-5-mini's description was incomplete and it misread 'A' as '4' pence.

rows.notes: Combined description from gemini-flash's split rows (its 11 and 12), which accurately capture 'Sub-Rector' and 'Two Garrets'. gpt-5-mini's segmentation was correct but its reading of description text was less accurate. Amounts are agreed and clear.
rows.english_description: Repayment by the Sub-Rector for furniture supplied for the two garrets, now repaid to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Repayment by the Sub-Rector for furniture supplied for the two garrets, amounting to £35 19s 0d.
